title: API Configuration

defaultModelDesc.analysisModel: Handles script analysis, storyboard construction and full-pipeline text reasoning.
defaultModelDesc.videoModel: Synthesizes images and instructions into final video clips.
defaultModelDesc.characterModel: Generate character portraits and appearance references from script descriptions
defaultModelDesc.locationModel: Generate scene environments and spatial references from script descriptions
defaultModelDesc.storyboardModel: Generate shot frames and visual references from storyboard scripts
defaultModelDesc.editModel: Perform localized edits, style adjustments and refinements on existing images
defaultModelDesc.audioModel: Convert text dialogue into natural and fluent speech audio
defaultModelDesc.lipSyncModel: Precisely synchronize speech audio with video character lip movements
defaultModelDesc.voiceDesignModel: Design custom voice tones and speech style profiles for characters

defaultModelSection.unifiedOverrideHint: Set the model responsible for image generation/editing across the entire system

providerPoolDesc: Configure and use a rich selection of models from global providers
dragToSortHint: Drag the top-left handle on each card to reorder providers
hideProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to hide this provider? It will be moved to the bottom and can be restored at any time.
confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
confirmDeleteModel: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
openaiCompatVideoOnlyHint: Only OpenAI official-format image-to-video models are supported.
testWarning: We recommend checking your configuration before adding

defaultModel.title: Default Model
defaultModel.hint: New projects and Asset Hub will use this default configuration. You can also customize models per project in project settings.

tutorial.title: Setup Guide
tutorial.subtitle: Follow these steps to complete the configuration

steps.ark_step1: Go to the Volcano Engine console to create an API Key
steps.ark_step2: On the model management page, click 'Enable All Models' button in the top right corner
steps.openrouter_step1: Go to OpenRouter platform and create an API Key (must select models with image capabilities)
steps.fal_step1: Go to FAL platform and create an API Key
steps.google_step1: Go to Google AI Studio and create an API Key
steps.deepseek_step1: Go to DeepSeek platform and create an API Key
steps.minimax_step1: Go to MiniMax platform and get an API Key
steps.vidu_step1: Go to the Vidu platform and click 'Create API Key'
steps.openai_compatible_step1: Enter any OpenAI-compatible service Base URL and API key
steps.gemini_compatible_step1: Enter any Gemini-compatible service Base URL and API key
steps.bailian_step1: Go to Alibaba Cloud Bailian console and get an API Key
steps.siliconflow_step1: Go to SiliconFlow console and create an API Key

assistantSubtitle: Convert third-party docs into executable image/video templates and auto-save the model.
assistantWelcome: Describe your API docs (endpoint, request body, response fields). I will ask follow-up questions and auto-save once valid.
assistantInputPlaceholder: Paste docs or describe endpoint details...
assistantDisabledHint: Save API key and Base URL first
assistantRequestFailed: Assistant request failed. Please try again later.
assistantResponseInvalid: Assistant response format is invalid. Please retry.
assistantCompletedMessage:
Model {model} has been added to this provider.
Click close to finish this chat.
